title: OmniProject RAID/risk IMPACT vocabulary entry
description: One canonical RAID/risk impact grade (the consequence magnitude if a risk materialises — the I in risk-exposure P×I), authored as a single JSON array (assets/impact-vocabulary.json), validated element-by-element against this schema and embedded by gen-impact-vocabulary. Every grade binds to an internal ordinal `level` — the invariant the risk-exposure maths + ordering + filtering key off.

labels.description: Optional per-locale translations of the label (BCP-47 key → text, e.g. { "de": "Niedrig", "en-GB": "Low" }). A viewer sees labels[theirLocale] ?? labels[lang] ?? label, so the same screen renders in each user's language.

level.description: The internal ordinal LEVEL this impact grade binds to (1 = least impact … ascending) — the invariant the risk-exposure maths (P×I) + ordering/filtering key off, kept SEPARATE from `order` (display position). The three shipped grades ARE the anchors (low=1, medium=2, high=3); an adjustable grade declares which ordinal band it binds to.

color.description: Swatch colour as a 6-digit hex (rendered via inline style, so a custom grade can carry any colour). Absent ⇒ a neutral swatch.

methodologies.description: Methodology tags this grade belongs to ('*' = neutral / all). Selecting a methodology surfaces its tagged grades, so each methodology can carry its own normal nomenclature. Absent ⇒ neutral.
